# thoth_api_keys (Data Source)

Reads API keys with optional scope and active filters.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `active_only` (Boolean) When true, only active keys are returned.
- `scope_level` (String) Optional scope filter (organization, fleet, endpoint, agent).
- `scope_target_id` (String) Optional scope target ID filter.

### Read-Only

- `data_json` (String) API key rows as JSON array.
- `total` (Number) Total API keys returned after filtering.
